slides.headline: Renewals disappear quietly.
slides.subtext: Expiration dates slip across inboxes, folders, and coordinator memory until someone has to scramble.

slides.headline: One place for clearance status.
slides.subtext: Onboarding steps and clearance work stay visible together instead of scattering across inboxes.

slides.headline: Missing credentials stop hiding.
slides.subtext: When a clearance case is pending, the missing document is easier to spot and follow up.

slides.headline: See expiring before it's urgent.
slides.subtext: Live status makes complete, expiring, and overdue items visible before the scramble starts.

slides.headline: Keep renewals in one place.
slides.subtext: Request a demo if your clinic wants renewal status and follow-up in one place.
